name: Vlissingen (Netherlands)
description: A red field charged with a white flask (vase) with golden handles, a chain and a crown — a canting reference to the town's name.
history: Flag of the municipality of Vlissingen (Flushing), a port city in the province of Zeeland; the flask is a canting charge on the town's name.

features.role: a white flask with golden handles, chain and crown
